params.name: Sepsung Phone
params.source: [[Koryeo Key Clues#Koryeo Treasure|Koryeo Key Clues - Koryeo Treasure]]
params.description: As Koryeo's technology giant, Sepsung has an extended industry chain. They produce smartphones with the world's leading screens and processors, as well as groundbreaking super-energy batteries. After five minutes of charging, you'll rest in peace for eternity!
